subcodes.title: Words to newspaper reporters, spoken on 1912-05-06
subcodes.first_line: My message is the oneness of humanity and universal peace; the harmony of true science and religion
subcodes.first_line_orig: پیام من وحدت عالم انسانی است و صلح عمومی و تطبیق مسائل دنیه با علوم صحیحه تساوی حقوق
subcodes.subjects: @lists; enumerations of Baha'i principles, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @wealth inequality and its moderation, @oneness; unity of religion, @religion as reality; definitions of religion, @blind imitation [taqlid], @harmony of science and religion, @equality of men and women, @unity; oneness of humanity, @universal peace; world unity
